recommendations.subsection_within_section: Entity & Real Estate Structure → Foundational Move

estimate.narrative_context: Direct professional fees and recording cost; downstream year-one tax benefit (~$500K) tracked via REC-TAX-006/007.

scenario_range.computation_method: Range from rec file QUANTIFIED IMPACT FRAMEWORK direct cost band

action_items.description: Form Holloway Properties LLC in Georgia and draft operating agreement.
sub_steps: File Articles of Organization with GA SOS
Mirror ownership proportions to operating LLC initially

action_items.description: Obtain Truist lender consent for transfer of Kennesaw HQ to common-ownership entity.
Execute deed transferring Kennesaw HQ from HIS LLC to Holloway Properties LLC and record with Cobb County.
Engage broker for FMV rent opinion and execute triple-net lease between Holloway Properties LLC (landlord) and HIS (tenant).
sub_steps: Obtain Cobb County industrial rent comps
Draft NNN lease at market rate

action_items.description: CPA prepares §721/§351 tax memo documenting tax-deferred contribution and basis tracking.
Update property and liability insurance to reflect new property LLC ownership.

recommendations._audit_notes: Direct cost only; downstream year-one tax savings (~$500K) computed under REC-TAX-006 + REC-TAX-007 to avoid double-count. Sequenced before F-reorg per rec file.

estimate.narrative_context: Direct professional fees of the F-reorg itself; option value (>$8M) realized through downstream recap, GRAT/IDGT, charitable, and stock-vs-asset bridge moves.

scenario_range.computation_method: Range from rec file worked example for Holloway-style client

action_items.description: Confirm S-election integrity and shareholder eligibility (Marcus 88%, Derek 12%).
Engage specialist M&A counsel with documented F-reorg experience.
Form Holloway Holdings entity in Georgia and obtain EIN.
Draft Plan of Reorganization, Share Exchange Agreement, and Holdco operating agreement.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Check in with {{partner_type}} on F-reorg drafting progress for {{rec_id}}

action_items.description: Execute share exchange per Plan of Reorganization with all shareholders (Marcus and Derek).
File Form 2553 (Holdco S-election) and Form 8869 (QSub election for HIS).
Confirm IRS acceptance of S-election and QSub election; update banking, insurance, and vendor records.

recommendations._audit_notes: F-reorg quantified as direct cost only per firm policy; downstream value (>$8M) attributed to enabled recs (recap, GRAT, IDGT, DAF, deal bridge) to avoid double-count.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated valuation discount captured on Marcus's 88% non-voting interest at midpoint business value of $35.2M, applying 30% combined LOM/minority discount to be transferred via downstream GRAT/IDGT/SLAT.

scenario_range.computation_method: discount range 25%-35% applied to Marcus's $30.66M non-voting interest at midpoint business value

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts amended Holdco operating agreement with voting/non-voting class structure.
Obtain Derek Chen consent on recap of his 12% interest into voting/non-voting classes.
Engage qualified appraiser for LOM and minority discount analysis on non-voting interest.
Execute amended operating agreement and re-issue unit certificates reflecting class structure.
CPA tax memo confirming non-recognition treatment of recap.

recommendations._audit_notes: Used 30% midpoint discount per rec file; range 25%-35% appraisal-supported. Derek's 12% recap consent flagged as decision needed. Discount value flows to GRAT/IDGT planning downstream — do not double-count estate tax savings here.

estimate.narrative_context: Direct attorney drafting cost; avoided transaction friction $25K-$100K at deal-time.

scenario_range.computation_method: Range from rec file QUANTIFIED IMPACT FRAMEWORK

action_items.description: M&A attorney drafts replacement operating agreement reflecting holdco structure, recap, transfer restrictions, and Derek's 12% economics.
Both owners (Marcus and Derek) review and execute replacement operating agreement.
File state amendment if required and coordinate buy/sell provisions with REC-RSK-001.

recommendations._audit_notes: 2009 operating agreement (17 years stale) replaced as part of restructuring; coordinates with buy/sell and recap.

estimate.narrative_context: Annual review cost; avoided transaction friction $10K-$50K+ at deal time.

scenario_range.computation_method: Range from rec file QUANTIFIED IMPACT FRAMEWORK

action_items.description: Conduct annual review of operating, shareholder, buy/sell, and inter-entity agreements with attorney.
sub_steps: Identify drift between docs and practice

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Schedule annual operating-agreement audit with {{partner_type}} for {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: Annual maintenance item; long_running with annual cadence.

estimate.narrative_context: Probate cost avoided on probate-eligible assets (~$5M of liquid+real estate excluding business), at GA midrange 2% attorney fee.

scenario_range.computation_method: GA probate attorney fees at 1%-3% of $5M probate estate

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts joint revocable living trust for Marcus and Catherine.
Fund the trust by retitling investment accounts, real estate (East Cobb residence, Blue Ridge), and post-recap voting interest into the trust.
sub_steps: Deed East Cobb and Blue Ridge to trust
Title voting Holdco units to trust post-recap

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Check trust funding progress with {{partner_type}} for {{rec_id}}

action_items.description: Update beneficiary designations on retirement accounts (Marcus 401(k), Catherine Rollover IRA) and life insurance policies to align with estate plan.
Schedule annual review of trust assets and successor trustee designations.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Annual review of trust asset schedule and successor trustees for {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: Probate estate excludes business interest (held outside probate via separate planning) and retirement accounts (beneficiary designation). Used $5M as estimate of liquid + real estate.

estimate.narrative_context: Direct drafting cost for full document set; avoids conservatorship costs ($5K-$25K) and probate friction.

scenario_range.computation_method: Range from rec file direct cost band

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts pour-over wills, financial POAs, healthcare directives, HIPAA authorizations, and guardianship designations for Marcus and Catherine.
Draft separate HIPAA authorization and healthcare/financial POA for Olivia (age 19, adult).
Notarize, witness, and distribute originals/copies of all documents to clients, healthcare providers, and PSA file.

recommendations._audit_notes: Decisions needed: guardianship designation for Sophie (not named in 2014 will). Olivia at 19 needs own HIPAA/POA per rec file.

estimate.narrative_context: Estate tax savings from systematic annual gifting program over 20 years: $19K x 2 spouses x 4 donees x 20 yrs = $3.04M removed; at 40% federal estate tax = $1.216M (excluding compound growth on gifted assets).

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: principal-only at 40%; high: principal + 7% compound growth over 20 years at 40% estate tax

action_items.description: Identify and confirm donee list (Olivia, James, Sophie, Eleanor) and gift vehicles (direct cash vs. Crummey trusts).
Calendar and execute annual gifts each January using $152K combined annual exclusion capacity.
sub_steps: Coordinate Crummey notices for trust gifts

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Execute annual exclusion gifts in January for {{rec_id}}

action_items.description: CPA files Form 709 to report gift-splitting election and any gifts requiring reporting.

recommendations._audit_notes: Decision flagged on per-child trust vs. pot trust and direct cash vs. Crummey vehicles. Donee count of 4 includes Eleanor (Marcus's mother); program coordinates with REC-EST-005 children's trusts.

timing_bucket_inferred.source_signal: Phase 4 — Post-Reorg Integration (Days 60-120) extends past 120 days for IRS acceptance
Recap follows F-reorg per sequencing dependency; rec file says ~30-60 days post-F-reorg
